sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n73563" key="o(mo/dais" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁμό-δαις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">δαιτος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n73563.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">companion at table,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4093.tlg001:1:187" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Theod.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.187</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4093.tlg001:210" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">210</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
